title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 66.398 - Appropriations from convention and tourism tax, limitation on
text:
66.398.  Appropriations from convention and tourism tax, limitation on. — The governing body of any county adopting a tax pursuant to the provisions of sections 66.390 to 66.398 shall appropriate money from the convention and tourism fund for no other purposes than set forth in section 66.395.
(L. 1975 H.B. 218 § 66.405)
